Indicator: Number of SBAs recruited
Definition: Total number of Skilled Birth Attendants recruited and engaged during the reporting period
Numerator Definition: Not applicable (count indicator)
column12: Might be good to be able to have a geo-breakdown of the number. To whatever extent is possible. State, LGA, etc...

Indicator: Proportion of SBAs deployed per state
Definition: Percentage of recruited SBAs that have been deployed to their assigned health facilities within a state
Numerator Definition: Number of recruited SBAs deployed to designated facilities in the state
Denominator Definition: Total number of recruited SBAs in the state
column12: Might be good to be able to have a geo-breakdown of the number. To whatever extent is possible. State, LGA, etc...

Indicator: Proportion of CBHWs  recruited
Definition: Percentage of Community-Based Health Workers (CBHWs) recruited relative to the recruitment target
Numerator Definition: Number of CBHWs recruited during the reporting period
Denominator Definition: Total number of CBHWs planned for recruitment based on signed Mou

Indicator: Number of CBHWs trained
Definition: Total number of Community-Based Health Workers who successfully completed the required training programme
Numerator Definition: Not applicable (count indicator)

Indicator: Proportion of CBHWs deployed per state
Definition: Percentage of recruited CBHWs that have been deployed to their assigned communities within a state
Numerator Definition: Number of recruited CBHWs deployed in the state
Denominator Definition: Total number of recruited CBHWs in the state based on signed MoUs

Indicator: % of recruited CBHWs that have been absorbed
Definition: Percentage of recruited CBHWs that have been formally integrated into the state or local government health workforce establishment after the recruitment programme
Numerator Definition: Number of recruited CBHWs formally absorbed into the health workforce establishment

Indicator: Proportion of facilities with minimum of 4 SBA
Definition: Percentage of health facilities that meet the minimum staffing standard of having at least four Skilled Birth Attendants (SBAs) available and deployed to provide maternal and newborn health services
Numerator Definition: Number of facilities with at least four skilled birth attendants (e.g., midwives, nurses, qualified to provide skilled birth attendance) available

Indicator:
Proportion of PHCs with six tracer commodities available:
- Oxytocin
- MMS
- ACT
- Pentavalent vaccines
- HIV rapid test kits
- At least 3 modern contraceptives
Definition: Percentage of PHCs with all six tracer commodities available on the day of assessment
Numerator Definition: Number of PHCs with all six tracer commodities available

Indicator:
Proportion of facilities with the PPH bundle commodities available:
- Oxytocin
- Misoprostol
- HSC
- Calibrated drapes
- TXA
Definition: Percentage of facilities with all components of the postpartum haemorrhage (PPH) bundle available at the time of assessment
Numerator Definition: Number of facilities with all five PPH bundle commodities available

Indicator: Proportion of vaccines sufficient (Above Reorder point 50-80%)
Definition: Percentage of NSCS/zones/state/facilities whose vaccine stock levels are within the sufficient stock range (50–80% of maximum stock level or above the reorder point)
Numerator Definition: Number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with vaccine stock levels in the sufficient range.
Denominator Definition: Total number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities assessed for vaccine stock status
Rationale: Assesssing stock availability to guide forecasts, procurements and vaccines distribution

Indicator: Proportion of vaccines to reorder (Below Sufficient 25 - 50%)
Definition: Percentage of NSCS/zones/state/facilities whose vaccine stock levels have fallen into the reorder range (25–50% of maximum stock level)
Numerator Definition: Number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with vaccine stock levels in the reorder range.
Denominator Definition: Total number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities assessed for vaccine stock status

Indicator: Proportion of of vaccines understocked (<25%)
Definition: Percentage of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with vaccine stock levels below 25% of the required stock level
Numerator Definition: Number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with vaccine stock levels below 25% of required stock.
Denominator Definition: Total number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities assessed for vaccine stock status

Indicator: Proportion of of vaccines stocked out at the last mile (Kaduna, others)
Definition: Percentage of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with zero usable stock of all basic RI antigens at the time of assessment
Numerator Definition: Number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities with no stock of the vaccine(s) assessed
Denominator Definition: Total number of NSCS/zones/state/facilities assessed for vaccine availability

Indicator: Proportion of wards/Main PHCs with functional SDD/CCE per state
Definition: Percentage of wards or Main PHCs with a functional Solar Direct Drive (SDD) refrigerator or Cold Chain Equipment (CCE) available and operational at the time of assessment.
Numerator Definition: Number of wards/Main PHCs with functional SDD/CCE.
Denominator Definition: Total number of wards/Main PHCs assessed in the state.
Rationale: Essential for vaccine potency and immunization services

Indicator:
Proportion of visited PHCs with functional maternal health equipment:
- Delivery bed
- ⁠Episiotomy and suturing set
- ⁠Manual vacuum aspirator 
- ⁠Ambu bag (neonatal size)
- ⁠Pulse oximeter
Definition: Percentage of assessed PHCs with all specified maternal and newborn health equipment available and functional at the time of assessment
Numerator Definition: Number of visited PHCs with all listed maternal health equipment available and functional
Rationale: Assess facility readiness to provide essential maternal and newborn care

Theme: Facility type and status (show charts by BHCPF vs Non)
Indicator: Proportion of L2 functional facilities per state (show charts by BHCPF vs Non)
Definition: Percentage of assessed Level 2 PHCs that meet all defined functionality criteria
Numerator Definition: Number of L2 facilities

Indicator: Proportion of L1 functional facilities per state
Definition: Percentage of assessed Level 1 PHCs that meet all defined functionality criteria
Numerator Definition: Number of L1 facilities

Indicator: Proportion of partially functional facilities per state
Definition: Percentage of assessed facilities that meet some but not all functionality criteria
Numerator Definition: Number of facilities classified as partially functional

Indicator: Proportion of non functional facilities per state
Definition: Percentage of assessed facilities that do not meet minimum functionality standards
Numerator Definition: Number of facilities classified as non-functional

Indicator: Number of revitalized PHC facilities per state
Definition: Total number of PHCs that have completed the approved revitalization process within the state
Numerator Definition: Number of revitalized PHCs
Rationale: Track achievement of PHC strengthening investments

Indicator:
Proportion of visited PHCs offering essential services including:
- Immunization
- Family planning
- ANC
- Delivery
- Malaria treatment
- HIV diagnosis"
Definition: Percentage of assessed PHCs providing all specified essential health services at the time of assessment
Numerator Definition: Number of PHCs providing all listed essential services
Rationale: Assessing scale/scope of facility readiness to deliver essential maternal and child healthnservices

Indicator: Proportion of BHCPF facilities that received their quarterly disbursement
Definition: Percentage of BHCPF-supported facilities that received the expected quarterly disbursement during the reporting period
Numerator Definition: Number of BHCPF facilities that received quarterly disbursement
Denominator Definition: Total number of BHCPF-supported facilities eligible for disbursement

Indicator: Total funds received (expected vs received)
Definition: Proportion of expected BHCPF funds that were actually received by facilities during the reporting period
Numerator Definition: Total amount of BHCPF funds received.
Denominator Definition: Total amount of BHCPF funds expected.

Indicator: Proportion of BHCPF facilities that received NHIA capitation funds
Definition: Percentage of BHCPF-supported facilities that received NHIA capitation payments during the reporting period
Numerator Definition: Number of BHCPF facilities that received NHIA capitation funds
Denominator Definition: Total number of BHCPF facilities eligible for NHIA capitation

Indicator: Proportion of BHCPF facilities that received both NPHCDA Gateway and NHIA Capitation funds
Definition: Percentage of BHCPF facilities that received both funding streams during the reporting period.
Numerator Definition: Number of BHCPF facilities receiving both NPHCDA Gateway and NHIA capitation funds.
Denominator Definition: Total number of BHCPF facilities eligible for both funding streams.

Indicator: Maternal Mortality Rate across BHCPF Facilities vs non BHCPF facilities
Definition: Number of maternal deaths per 100,000 live births occurring in BHCPF-supported facilities compared to non-BHCPF facilities
Numerator Definition: Number of maternal deaths recorded in the facility type
Denominator Definition: Number of live births recorded in the facility type × 100,000
Rationale: Most important measure of maternal health impact.

Indicator: Under-5 Mortality Rate Across BHCPF Facilities vs non BHCPF facilities
Definition: Number of deaths among children under five years per 1,000 live births in BHCPF versus non-BHCPF facilities
Numerator Definition: Number of deaths among children under five years

Indicator: Proportion of maternal deaths resulting from PPH
Definition: Percentage of maternal deaths attributable to postpartum haemorrhage
Numerator Definition: Number of maternal deaths caused by PPH
Rationale: Identifies largest preventable cause of maternal death.

Indicator: Proportion of maternal deaths resulting from Pre/eclampsia
Definition: Percentage of maternal deaths attributable to pre-eclampsia/eclampsia.
Numerator Definition: Number of maternal deaths caused by pre-eclampsia/eclampsia
Rationale: Highlights quality of ANC and emergency obstetric care.

Indicator: Proportion of maternal deaths resulting from sepsis
Definition: Percentage of maternal deaths attributable to sepsis.
Numerator Definition: Number of maternal deaths caused by sepsis
Rationale: Indicates infection prevention and quality of care issues.

Indicator: Number of zero dose children (burden)
Definition: Number of surviving infants who have not received any routine vaccine, particularly Pentavalent 1
Numerator Definition: Number of zero-dose children identified

Indicator: Proportion of girls aged 9 years that have received HPV vaccination dose
Definition: Percentage of girls aged 9 years who received the recommended HPV vaccine dose
Numerator Definition: Number of girls aged 9 years vaccinated with HPV vaccine
Denominator Definition: Total number of eligible girls aged 9 years
Rationale: Measures progress on cervical cancer prevention.

Indicator: Percentage of family planning clients using modern contraceptives
Definition: Percentage of FP clients using modern contraceptive methods
Numerator Definition: Number of FP clients using modern contraceptive methods

Indicator: % of increase in utilization of FP services
Definition: Percentage increase in FP service utilization compared to baseline or previous period
Numerator Definition: FP clients in current period − FP clients in baseline period

Indicator: Proportion of children <1 year who have received the 3rd dose of Pentavalent vaccine
Definition: Total number of infants receiving Penta 3
Numerator Definition: Number of infants receiving Penta 3
Rationale: Best proxy for immunization system performance.

Indicator: Proportion of children <1 year who have received Measles 1 vaccine
Definition: Percentage of eligible children receiving Measles 1 vaccine
Numerator Definition: Number of children receiving Measles 1

Indicator: # of Deliveries in facilities
Definition: Total number of deliveries conducted in health facilities
Numerator Definition: Number of facility deliveries

Indicator: Proportion of deliveries by skilled birth attendance (Proportion of child deliveries against number of SBAs across PHCs)
Definition: Percentage of deliveries attended by a skilled birth attendant
Numerator Definition: Number of deliveries attended by an SBA
Rationale: One of the strongest predictors of maternal survival.

Indicator: % of women with a live birth who attended ANC 1
Definition: Percentage of women with a live birth who attended at least one ANC visit.
Numerator Definition: Number of women with live births who attended ANC1
Denominator Definition: Total number of women with live births

Indicator: % of women with a live birth who attended ANC 4
Definition: Percentage of women with live births who attended at least four ANC visits
Numerator Definition: Number of women with live births attending ANC4
Denominator Definition: Total number of women with live births

Indicator: Number of planned work plan activities completed
Definition: Total number of activities in the approved annual or implementation work plan that were completed during the reporting period
Numerator Definition: Number of work plan activities completed, ongoing or not done
